title: hieracium subramosum subsp. surrejanum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. surrejanum, also known as Hieracium surrejanum or hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium surrejanum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Hieracium surrejanum is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used to create topical creams or ointments for wound care and skin irritations.
